And so it's approaching work differently from more of an AI-native way, which is not just like, here's an output, we worked on it, don't worry about how we got here, do you like it or not?
Is it approved or not?
And so it adds more value to the service, because then this service can have higher leverage, and they also see all the work that happens underneath the hood.
Cool.
Awesome.
All right, let's call it, since we're over time.
Thank you, everyone.
And we'll see you.
everyone.
Have good one.
See ya.
